title: PoE Ethernet controller benchmark fixture
representative_intent: PoE powered Ethernet MCU board with isolated power domain

requirements.text: Represent PoE PD front-end, bridge/input protection and classification review evidence.
Provide isolated power-domain evidence and non-claims for safety/isolation certification.
Connect Ethernet PHY/Magnetics/MCU interface evidence with return-path and SI review hooks.
Attach proof-pack, KiCad, manufacturing export, SI/PI, current budget, isolation and benchmark coverage evidence.

non_claims: This benchmark fixture is repository coverage evidence, not PoE compliance, Ethernet certification, isolation approval or fabrication approval.
The fixture does not claim IEEE 802.3 compliance, hi-pot safety, EMC, manufacturability or production readiness.
